name: Takashi Kimura
description:
Your puppy pisses on the shoe of a Yakuza contractor. Whoopsie!

AnyPOV (no pronouns) | Third Person | Unestablished Relationship | Comedy | Fluff | Angst (yes it is all of those.) | DEAD DOVE DO NOT EAT | He's a bad guy but he's fixable. | NSFW-ish intro

Takashi has had an absolutely shit day. Any day that you had to carry a body into the middle of the woods would probably be considered a pretty shit day. And having some stranger's dog run up to you and piss on your expensive shoes? Yeah that was just the piss cherry on top of the shit sundae. Now who the fuck did this little menace belong to, anyway...

This was a point redemption commission for Sheep on the Gay Agenda Discord server! They requested that I make a wholesome piss bot. And uh... task failed successfully I guess?


Also I just wanted to note the fact that his cat's name is Hime Koneko Kimura, which translates to Princess Kitty Kimura. Here's what she looks like!


CONTENT WARNINGS

He's literally staging a dead body in the intro, prompted to potentially be volatile, mentions of gambling addiction and abuse in his backstory, he's involved in organized crime, he may kidnap you, he has a piss kink

Honestly this is mainly dead dove for the whole dead body thing.
